summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Windows installer bug fixes. Verified Bug #1 fix (real Windows binaries now served instead of fallback ZIPs) and Bug #2 fix (robust config.json write with permission validation). All backend endpoints serving correct file types with proper headers and magic bytes. All three installer source files contain the complete 5-step fix pattern.
passed_tests: Authentication: POST /api/auth/login with admin credentials returns access_token
Installer info: GET /api/installer/installer.info shows all three Windows artifacts available (exe, msi, zip)
Setup.exe download: Serves real Windows PE file (MZ header), 18.9 MB, correct Content-Type
Setup.msi download: Serves real MSI file (D0CF11E0A1B11AE1 header), 19.1 MB, correct Content-Type
Release.zip download: Serves real ZIP file (PK header), 37.7 MB, correct Content-Type
Agent-bundle.zip: Backwards compatibility endpoint working, serves valid ZIP
NSIS script static analysis: All 18 checks passed (ProgramData resolution, CreateDirRecursive, canary test, config.json validation, error messages)
CMD script static analysis: All 24 checks passed (ProgramData fallbacks, mkdir verification, canary round-trip, config.json validation with exit codes 10-15, service guard rail)
Inno script static analysis: All 17 checks passed (ForceDirectories with checks, canary test, config.json validation, mbError messages, ACL with (OI)(CI) inheritance)
